net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.ui.commands

Class DrawCabinCommand

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.eclipse.emf.common.command.AbstractCommand
      • net.bhl.cdt.commands.CDTCommand
        • net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.ui.commands.DrawCabinCommand
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    org.eclipse.emf.common.command.Command

    public class DrawCabinCommand
extends net.bhl.cdt.commands.CDTCommand
    This class refreshed the cabin view without modifying anything. It checks the layout of the cabin and warns the user.
    Author:
    marc.engelmann
